triples.subject: Americans
triples.sentence: In the first quarter of 2024, Americans bought 268,909 new electric vehicles, according to Kelley Blue Book counts.

triples.subject: EV share of total new-vehicle sales in Q1
triples.sentence: EV share of total new-vehicle sales in Q1 was 7.3%, a decrease from Q4 2023.

triples.subject: Tesla’s share of the electric vehicle market in Q1 2024
triples.sentence: Tesla’s share of the electric vehicle market in Q1 2024 was 51.3%, down from 61.7% one year earlier.

triples.subject: Cadillac
triples.object: 499.2% year-over-year increase in electric vehicle sales
triples.sentence: Cadillac achieved a 499.2% year-over-year increase in electric vehicle sales due to robust sales of its Lyriq model.

triples.subject: Mercedes
triples.sentence: At Mercedes, EV sales were up 66.9%.

triples.subject: BMW
triples.sentence: BMW posted a 62.6% increase in EV sales compared to Q1 2023.

triples.subject: Ford
triples.object: 86.1% year-over-year increase in Q1 EV sales
triples.sentence: On the non-luxury side, Ford achieved an 86.1% year-over-year increase in Q1 EV sales with the second-highest EV sales volume behind Tesla.

triples.subject: Average transaction price for a new EV in Q1
triples.sentence: The average transaction price for a new EV in Q1 was $55,167, a 9.0% decrease compared to Q1 2023 and down 3.8% quarter over quarter.
